sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52852" key="kalofo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾱλοφόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">κᾶλον</etym>) <sense id="n52852.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wood-carrier</tr_>, one of a soldier's attendants, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1338.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Dosiad.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
